BOTTLENECK: latency-bound
REASONING: This kernel performs no GPU computation whatsoever—it only calls `cudaDeviceSynchronize()` and `std::puts()`, both of which are host-side operations. There is no compute, memory, or occupancy bottleneck because no actual CUDA kernel is launched.
